BusinessDays.!ret.!doc: This will be the array of days that result from the calculations between each start and end dates

Hour.!ret.!doc: This will be the array of hours that result from the calculations for each date

Minute.!ret.!doc: This will be the array of minutes that result from the calculations for each date

Second.!ret.!doc: This will be the array of seconds that result from the calculations for each date

TimeMerge.!ret.!doc: This will be the array of dates that result from the calculations between each pairwise date and time

Zone.!0.!doc: Make the date(s) into an array and parse through each one to find the timezone offset and add to the "zones" array

adjustDate.!ret.!doc: set the new date with the adjusted properties

handleNonPermutedArrays.!ret.!doc: Convert date to seconds for math operations to match Domino behavior

processDates.!0.!doc: Convert single dates to an array
